subject: SUNDAY  - YOU
body:
Jeffrey - Simply can't get you off my brain.  Yes, you'll make it  through . 
I can't offer you anything special  - I am not anyone like those  you know nor 
am I  special  or important -  However ,  whenever , I am here for you and 
there is
probably nothing Bruce would not do for you , anywhere , anytime , no  matter 
what .  Count on him.
HUGS  (prayers)  - 
Marcia  .



**************Gas prices getting you down? Search AOL Autos for 
fuel-efficient used cars.      (http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007)
